headline: ASEAN Maritime Security Centre Opens in Kuantan
context: Malaysia inaugurated the ASEAN Maritime Security Information Centre in Kuantan in January 2026 with RM180 million investment.

cards.big: ASEAN Maritime Security Centre opens in Kuantan with RM180 million
cards.sub: Centre provides real-time maritime domain awareness for all 10 ASEAN members

cards.big: 24-hour monitoring covers 15 million square kilometres of ASEAN waters
cards.sub: System tracks 180,000 vessel movements daily via satellite and radar

cards.big: Staff of 120 includes representatives from 8 participating ASEAN nations
cards.sub: Vietnam and Myanmar opted out of initial participation citing sovereignty

cards.big: Centre detected 45 suspicious vessel movements in first 2 months of operation
cards.sub: Information led to 8 joint enforcement actions across 3 ASEAN member waters

cards.big: Maritime centre tests whether ASEAN cooperation can produce shared security capabilities
ASEAN maritime centre in Kuantan — regional hubs work when staffed, funded, and given operational authority.
